name: AI Intent Engine
features: API route /api/ai/parse-intent that uses Claude Haiku to parse Vietnamese chat messages
Intent detection: split bill vs money transfer
Follow-up question generation when info is missing
AI response card component in chat

success_criteria.description: AI detects intent='split' from '1tr phở 8 người'
AI detects intent='transfer' from 'Mai chuyển cho Hai 200k'
When amount missing, AI generates follow-up asking for amount
When split type unclear, AI offers options A/B/C
Minimum to confirm: amount + intent detected
API route returns structured JSON with parsed fields

edge_cases: 'hôm qua ăn 500k ngon' — past tense, still create bill?
'ok' or 'hello' — no intent, should not trigger bill
'chia đều cả team' — no amount, ask for amount
'1tr2 bún bò' — no people count, suggest bill mở
constraints: Use Claude Haiku for cost efficiency
Vietnamese amount parser must work WITHOUT LLM (pure regex/logic)
Graceful fallback if API key missing or LLM fails
